name: Choosing Your Doctor in Utah Work Injury Claims

mainEntity.name: Can I choose my own doctor for workplace injury treatment in Salt Lake County?
mainEntity.text: Can I choose my own doctor for workplace injury treatment in Salt Lake County?

acceptedAnswer.text: In Utah, yes, after initial visit to employer panel doctor, you can select any qualified provider for ongoing care.

suggestedAnswer.text: Utah Code §34A-2-418 allows choice post-first aid. Employer panels limited to 3 docs; refuse unreasonable referrals. Insurers challenge 'unauthorized' care to deny payment—pre-approve specialist in Draper/Holladay.

description: In Utah, yes, after initial visit to employer panel doctor, you can select any qualified provider for ongoing care.
